words.def: a large bundle bound for storage or transport
words.zh: n. 包, 捆, 貨物, 災難

words.def: (usually followed by `to') having the necessary means or skill or know-how or authority to do something
words.zh: a. 能幹的, 能夠的

words.def: a workplace for the conduct of scientific research
words.zh: n. 實驗室, 研究室

words.def: a general name for beer made with a top fermenting yeast; in some of the United States an ale is (by law) a brew of more than 4% alcohol by volume
